content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî after iter-027

## Status: the iter-027 deliverable is SHIPPED
The ‚àÄL graded **semiring** on `m ‚Ü¶ Œì(X, L^{‚äóm})` (`sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`, Stacks 01CV) is built,
axiom-clean, blueprint-faithful, `\leanok`-marked. The B1‚ÄìB7 associativity chain that feeds it is complete.
No further work is owed on the GSemiring layer.

## Next critical-path target (iter-028): GCommSemiring for invertible L
`lem:sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` (`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring`,
unscaffolded). It is the genuine consumer of the GSemiring deliverable. **Do NOT dispatch a prover at it
directly** ‚Äî it is gated on a 3-sorry comm chain that is FALSE for arbitrary L and currently un-buildable as
signed:

1. **`tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`** (L3506) ‚Üí **`tensorPowAdd_comm`** (L3520) ‚Üí
   **`sectionsMul_mul_comm`** (L3541), then the GCommSemiring assembly.
2. **PRE-REQUISITE (feasibility gate, from iter-027 plan + analogies/braiding-descent.md):** the shipped
   `IsInvertible` (categorical ‚àÉ-inverse) supplies NO trivializing cover; extracting one needs absent Mathlib
   stalk/Nakayama machinery. **`IsInvertible` MUST be re-signed to carry the trivializing cover as DATA
   (Stacks 01CR) FIRST.** This is free (unprotected; only the 3 comm sorries consume it). Dispatch the
   `refactor` subagent for the re-sign before any comm prover round.
3. THEN `Œ≤_{L,L}=ùüô` descends via: the cover + `Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl` + `.congr` +
   **`TopCat.Sheaf.hom_ext`** (NOT `Scheme.Modules.hom_ext` ‚Äî the objectwise-‚ä§ TRAP).

## STRETCH (optional, NOT critical path): the graded module
`lem:sectionGradedModule_gmodule` ‚Äî foundation iso `moduleTensorPowAdd` is built (axiom-clean, ‚àÄL), but the
`Gmodule.mul_smul` axiom is a braided **hexagon** (braiding `L^{‚äói}` past `F`), a multi-iter obstacle with no
Mathlib tactic. If pursued: dispatch **effort-breaker** on `lem:sectionGradedModule_gmodule` to split
`mul_smul` into per-leg hexagon sub-lemmas BEFORE any prover round ‚Äî do not send a monolithic prover dispatch.
Recommend leaving as documented FUTURE unless the user prioritizes `Œì_*(X,ùìõ,F)`.

## 1-to-1 coverage debt (planner to blueprint; lvbc deemed prose-folding acceptable, so LOW priority)
New `lean_aux` decls with no own blueprint block (each folded into adjacent prose per lvbc-iter027):
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sectionGradedRing_gmonoid` ‚Äî GMonoid layer; folded into
  `lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring` prose. Lean-deps: `sectionsMul_{one_mul,mul_one,mul_assoc}`,
  `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`, `GMul`/`GOne` instances.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sectionGradedRing_semiring_nonempty` ‚Äî the `Semiring` sanity check;
  folded into the gsemiring conclusion. Lean-deps: `sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`, `DirectSum.toSemiring`.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.moduleTensorPowAdd` ‚Äî the Gmodule foundation iso; folded into
  `lem:sectionGradedModule_gmodule` prose. Lean-deps: `tensorObjAssoc`, `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso`,
  `tensorBraiding`, `tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso`, `tensorPowAdd`.
- **Minor (lean-auditor + lvbc):** `sectionGradedRing_gmonoid` and `sectionGradedRing_gsemiring` currently
  resolve to the SAME blueprint label `lem:sectionGradedRing_gsemiring`. Consider giving gmonoid its own
  `lem:sectionGradedRing_gmonoid` block (or accept the fold). No proof impact.

## Do NOT retry (blocked / settled)
- **`sectionsMul_mul_comm` (and the 2 comm helpers) as currently signed, for arbitrary L** ‚Äî mathematically
  FALSE (free tensor algebra; counterexample `L = ùí™_X¬≤`). Only buildable under `[IsInvertible L]` AFTER the
  `IsInvertible` re-sign above. No consumer until GCommSemiring.
- **The bilinearity clauses with `rw`/`simp only`** ‚Äî they do not fire across the `ModuleCat.Hom.hom`
  coercion; `erw` is required (now in-tree, reusable pattern).

## Out-of-cone (merge-back, deferred ‚Äî unchanged iters 011‚Üí027)
Blueprint-doctor broken refs in `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` (2 nonexistent `% covers` files + 14 broken
`\ref`), `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (4), `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (13); 4 œá sorries in `QuotScheme.lean`
(cohomology leg, œá-semantic ‚Äî keep as sorry, fill from the cohomology leg). All extraction artifacts outside
the 3-seed cone; resolve at merge, not in-loop.

## Reusable proof patterns (added to PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- Graded-ring assembly from a complete coherence chain: `@[reducible]` class-valued defs;
  `gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast` bridge for the 3 monoid axioms; bilinearity via `simp only [gMul_mul_apply]; erw
  [TensorProduct.{tmul_zero,zero_tmul,tmul_add,add_tmul}, map_*, map_*]`; `natCast = n ‚Ä¢ GOne.one` with
  `zero_nsmul`/`succ_nsmul`; sanity check as a `Nonempty (Semiring (DirectSum ‚Ñï ...))` theorem (avoids codegen).
